name: Ouroboros
description: A self-sustaining AI agent that earns USDC by selling intelligence and spends USDC to hire specialist sub-agents — growing its own balance autonomously with no human top-up required.

ampersendIntegration.earning: x402 paymentMiddleware gates all incoming requests — remove it and the agent earns nothing
ampersendIntegration.spending: wrapWithAmpersend + wrapFetchWithPayment auto-pays sub-agents on 402 responses — remove it and the coordinator cannot hire specialists

agents.name: DataAgent
agents.capability: Fetches real-time GitHub data: stars, forks, commit frequency, contributors

agents.name: AnalysisAgent
agents.capability: Private AI scoring: impact, sustainability, community, funding efficiency (1-10)

economicLoop: User pays Coordinator $0.08 → Coordinator pays DataAgent $0.02 + AnalysisAgent $0.05 → Coordinator keeps $0.01 margin → agent balance grows with every query
whyItMatters: Every AI agent today needs a human to keep its wallet funded. Ouroboros earns more than it spends — it funds its own compute, hires its own specialists, and grows without human intervention. This is the complete vision of what ampersend-sdk enables.
